creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 153721
Makefile with CPE information added

archivers/gcpio has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2015-1197). This patch add CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
